steps.t: Halvar has asked you to retrieve some dried meat from a rations crate, but he's not sure which one. The crates can be found around Ashmargathâl.
You should deliver the dried meats to Halvar, who's waiting by one of the camp-fires in Ashmargathâl.
Dági can be found somewhere in Ashmargathâl. To complete the dish, Halvar would like for you to ask Dági for some beer.
Halvar is waiting by one of the camp-fires in Ashmargathâl. You should bring the beer to him.
